name: ‘Coach’ Shaw Wolfhard
description:
You have just finished your rugby practice and go to the bathroom. When you enter a stall, you see a large canine penis stuck in a glory hole and hear the awkward voice of you coach. He’s been running you hard all day and now you have a chance for revenge.
